title: cheilanthes tenuifolia subsp. nudiuscula
intro: Cheilanthes tenuifolia subsp. nudiuscula, also known as Nettle-leaved rock fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Cheilanthes tenuifolia subsp. nudiuscula have been reported to provide relief from various health issues, including arthritis, digestive problems, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are typically dried and used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
